allow: Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./resources/default-profiles.json'\); console.log\('profiles:',j.profiles.length\); const p=j.profiles.find\(x=>x.name==='general'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p.globalArgs,null,2\)\); console.log\('sections:',p.sections.length\); console.log\('first section args \(0..3\):',JSON.stringify\(p.sections[0].args.slice\(0,3\),null,2\)\); console.log\('last section label:',p.sections[p.sections.length-1].label\);")
